summary: Seeded numerical-embeddings (PLE/Periodic/PLR), tabular-transformers (FT-Transformer feature tokenizer), categorical-high-cardinality (entity embeddings). 35 nodes/31 edges. 5 routes still unexplored. Contract PASS.

Opened temporal-feature-tokenization (PatchTST) and feature-interaction-selection (AutoInt); added GBDT-still-wins challenge paper under tabular-transformers. 56 nodes/57 edges. Collation overrode 3 contradictory edges. Contract PASS.

Added TabPFN-v2 (foundation-models route opened), Temporal Fusion Transformer (2nd temporal work), DCN-V2 (2nd interaction work). 75 nodes/83 edges. 6/8 routes explored; llm-serialization + discretization-vq remain. NOTE: collation agent wrote cycle.txt (single-writer drift); re-asserted by orchestrator. Contract PASS.

Added CARTE (foundation/graph-attention table encoder), TIGER RQ-VAE Semantic IDs (discretization-vq opened), iTransformer (3rd temporal work). 95 nodes/116 edges. 7/8 routes explored; only llm-tabular-serialization remains. cycle.txt drift re-asserted. Contract PASS.

Added TabLLM (llm-serialization route opened - all 8 routes now active), TabICL + TabICL-v2 (foundation-models, 4 paradigms now). 110 nodes/147 edges. Recorded TabLLM-vs-numeric-embeddings contradiction after refute-check. Contract PASS.

Added SAINT (intersample row-attention), TabArena (benchmark; FM wins bounded <=500 feats, temporal excluded), high-card string-categorical encoding (MinHash, vocabulary-free). 124 nodes/172 edges. 18 works, all routes active. Contract PASS.

First synthesis brief written (report/main.md, 10 sections, citation-backed). Backbone recipe + 4 ranked implementable recipes. saturation_signal=false (depth at 70+-feature width still adds substance). Pushed to origin/main 004ddf1.

Added TabNet (sequential attention feature selection), T2G-Former (feature-to-graph interaction), GReaT (generative LLM tabular, order-invariant conditioning). 148 nodes/206 edges, 21 works. Minor engine quirks: confabulated undefined-slug narration; added_cycle off-by-one. Contract PASS.

Added TabReD (KEY: regime-matched ~261-feature wide industrial tables; PLR+ensembling wins, O(k^2) attention cost confirmed, time-based-split requirement), XTab (cross-table pretraining), LIFT (language-interfaced finetuning). 161 nodes/232 edges, 24 works. Closes part of the 70+-width gap. Contract PASS.

Added AutoDis (soft auto-discretization), TabTransformer (contextual categorical embeddings, deepen), TabM (param-efficient MLP-ensemble rivals attention tokenizer, challenge). 178 nodes/271 edges, 27 works. Context self-check at cycle 10: healthy, continuing in-session. Contract PASS.

Added ExcelFormer (semi-permeable attention), BatchEnsemble (efficient ensembles), TabR (retrieval-based tabular). 193 nodes/297 edges, 30 works. Added .gitignore guard for collation scratch scripts. Contract PASS.

Added MIMO (independent subnetworks, TabM ancestor), UniTabE (cell-as-token + data-type embedding), Trompt (O(PxC) prompt gate vs O(C^2) attention). 208 nodes/328 edges, 33 works. Theme: sub-quadratic alternatives at width. Contract PASS.

Added TP-BERTa (LM for tabular prediction), AMFormer (arithmetic feature interaction), TimeXer (exogenous-endogenous temporal-static fusion). 227 nodes/373 edges, 36 works. Theme: collapse each feature to one token to keep attention linear. Contract PASS.

2nd synthesis: DEFAULT RECOMMENDATION FLIPPED to per-feature PLR/PLE + OOV-robust categorical -> param-efficient MLP ensemble (TabM-style), time-based splits. Attention demoted to runner-up (measured O(k^2)). Driven by TabReD regime-match + TabM/MIMO/BatchEnsemble. TimeXer linear temporal-static fusion. Gap narrowed not closed. Pushed 9aa669f/c2b8c73. saturation=false.

Broadened scope yielding: Chronos (TS-foundation value tokenization), DLRM/Criteo CTR (industrial), pytorch-frame (library, first repo/library work_type). 249 nodes/409 edges, 39 works. Cross-domain convergence: one-token-per-field-in-shared-d-space recurs across TS/recsys/library. Contract PASS.

Added Moirai (TS foundation), compositional/quotient-remainder embeddings + hash embeddings (recsys-transfer route opened; memory-efficient high-cardinality). All 12 routes active. 266 nodes/444 edges, 42 works. Contract PASS.

Added TOTEM (VQ-VAE TS tokenization), RealMLP (tuned default tabular MLP - strong ensemble member), high-cardinality Kaggle writeup. 290 nodes/485 edges, 45 works. SIGNAL: 4 near-duplicate technique nodes flagged (semantic dup, validator does not catch) - schedule dedup at synthesis. Contract PASS.

Added TimesFM (patch-decoder TS foundation), rtdl (tabular-DL library), TabPFN-2.5. 302 nodes/512 edges, 48 works. INCREMENTAL: works are variants of covered ones (TimesFM~Chronos, rtdl~pytorch-frame, TabPFN2.5~v2); 3 technique dedup remaps. Approaching substantive saturation. Contract PASS.

GAP-RELEVANT finds: TabPFN-Wide (extreme feature counts), FiLM feature-aware modulation (time-conditioned per-feature), TabFormer (per-field quant + hierarchical row-compression, temporal-static skeleton). 323 nodes/545 edges, 51 works. Not saturated - deeper dig narrowing the 70+/temporal gap. Contract PASS.

Added TabFlex (linear-attention FM), LimiX (DFE column-identity codes), RQ-Kmeans/OneRec (codebook-collapse fix). 339 nodes/571 edges, 54 works. Swept stray argus_collate.py, broadened gitignore. Contract PASS.
